summary: Carnival UK is proposing candidate movement affecting 398 across Cunard (142) and P&O brands — Putu Astra has completed an action-plan analysis ahead of tomorrow's 9:00 AM call with Amelia Annunziata. Four J1 visa refusals landed overnight (Stri Ratna), pointing to continued consular pressure; reapplications targeted for 4–6 months out. Today's Recruiting Meeting was canceled by Eduardo; Executive Team Meeting at 8:30 AM ET is the day's anchor.
